_comment: Intentionally malformed SARIF to exercise defensive parsing. parse_sarif must not raise on any of these inputs.

runs._comment: tool.driver is missing — _build_rule_map must return {} without raising

results._comment: message is a plain string (not an object) — legal fallback
locations is a string, not a list — path must be None

message.text: location field is malformed but result is otherwise valid

results._comment: locations[0] is missing physicalLocation — path must be None
unknown level string — must be treated as 'warning'

message.text: unknown level falls back to warning

results._comment: fully valid result that should survive despite malformed siblings

message.text: This valid result must survive all the malformed siblings

runs._comment: rules is a string, not a list — _build_rule_map must return {} gracefully
results is a dict, not a list — must be skipped
